text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I find myself at an amusement park to
attend a limited-time event that Kitasan Black
invited me to.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's a really huge maze, so you're apparently
allowed to guide participants toward the right
path from outside the maze!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Also, I heard yesterday that if you manage to
make it out, you get a medal commending your
succe—
Bakushin, Bakushiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? I feel like I know that voice...

Oh no! Another dead end?! This maze is a real
tough nut to crack!

I won't give up, however! As class representative,
I, Sakura Bakushin O, must set an example for
everyone else!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I knew it! Bakushin O is here for the maze as well!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O was actually the one who told me
about the medal! She sure sounds fired up!

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
Her being fired up is fine and dandy, but I have to
say, I'm starting to feel a little worried for her.

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
Do you happen to know her? She's been
wandering around in there since this morning.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not good! We have to hurry and guide
her toward the exit!

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
We've actually tried doing that several times, but
she's so absorbed in running around that she
doesn't hear anything we tell her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Don't worry! I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Bakushiiin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Who could be calling me, the class rep?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's me! Kitasan Black! I'm going to guide you
toward the exit, so please follow my instructions!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I did it! I earned myself a medal of
commendation!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And you, my dear class rep aide-in-training, did a
great job helping me! You get an A+ for your
effort!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just as the title implies, she's in training to take
on the crucial role of aiding the class rep!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! The thing is, I accompany Bakushin O on a
lot of outings, and...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! So this is the right path, is it? Much obliged!
BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! That's the wrong way! Heeey! Is she out of
earshot already?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
BAKUSHIN O! IT'S NOT THAT WAY! COME
BACK!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm? I feel like I just heard Kita calling me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Bakushiiin O! Your handkerchief! This girl picked it up
for you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! When did I end up so far away? My Bakushin
is too incredible!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, it seems like my voice can
actually reach Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I got assigned as her aide because I'm apparently
perfect for the role.
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's because you sound like someone she
knows.

Maybe your enka singing experience made your
voice stronger.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Now that you mention it, her voice does
make me feel kind of nostalgic...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I feel like I've heard her voice somewhere
before... but, anyway!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With Kita by my side, I feel even more confident
in my abilities as class representative! That's why
I'm counting on you to keep assisting me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay! I've got your back!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Right, now that I've shown you how it's done, it's
your turn to tackle the maze!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I will personally guide
you through it! Don't hesitate to ask me for help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black and I are able to enjoy the giant
maze thanks to Sakura Bakushin O's enthusiastic,
occasionally mistaken directions.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, maybe! Your voice is just so filled with
genuine enka spirit that it really resonates with
my Bakushin heart, Kita!
choice_data_list: How does it resonate with you, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Basically... like this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIIIINNN! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that vocal run was incredible! Hold on, let
me try too...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIIIINNN! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if "singing" is the best word to
describe what their voices are doing, but Kitasan
Black and Sakura Bakushin O look like they're
having fun.
